買mankind好過

beauty bay係咪英國網啊？

其實英國online store黎講，例如wiggle好probikekit都好，冇track個d全部都係經平郵送貨

平郵即係行船，架船會英國出發，之後係西班牙，葡萄牙，西非，南非，慢慢慢慢，印度，印尼，新加坡，馬來西亞，泰國，越南，之後先到香港。

呢d情況就好睇船期，每到一個port就會轉船，如果你個個port停個日期都趕得切下一班船個出發deadline，咁你最快10日送到，但如果miss左個班船，下一班又要等一個禮拜，你個package連續miss幾次船的話，我最長試過香港寄英國，2.5個月先到。

所以nontrack基本上係睇運

決定fb 問佢，佢咁答



We have been made aware by our carrier that unfortunately there have been severe delays to the postal system due to the overwhelming numbers of parcels entering the country this time of year.

While we work hard to ensure all parcels are delivered within the estimated time scale advised on the website, unfortunately there are sometimes exceptional circumstances that are beyond our control.

The courier has asked that we allow 20 business days (28 days) from the date your order was dispatched, for them to deliver the parcel before we can escalate this with them.

If 20 business days (28 days) have already elapsed, or your query is not in relation to the whereabouts of your order, please kindly reply directly to this email advising so and one of the team will be back in touch to assist further.

I am sorry for any inconvenience caused by these delays, rest assured your order is on its way and will be with you shortly. x
